description: Lock the 2026-06-25 triangular trade edge corrections that treat mercantilism and maritime insurance as commercial scaling infrastructure rather than direct technical enablers.

checks.reason: Britannica supports mercantilism as colonial raw-material and finished-goods trade policy, matching the commercial framework of triangular trade.
Britannica supports marine insurance as ship and cargo risk infrastructure for the shipping industry, matching triangular trade's recurring Atlantic shipping legs.
